email_subject: Application for Communication Officer (GEMS Program) – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Communication Officer position supporting the GEMS program at Atlas Copco Airpower, as advertised via Tempo-Team. With a background in digital marketing, content creation, and cross-functional coordination, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to this global transformation.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write targeted content, and coordinate website updates—skills directly applicable to creating clear communication plans and newsletters. I have experience using SharePoint, PowerPoint, and Forms, and I am comfortable adapting messages for diverse audiences. My project mirook.com involved developing visual materials and managing information flow across platforms, which aligns with the responsibilities of this role.

I am fluent in English, speak Turkish natively, and am actively learning Dutch (A2 level). I thrive in international environments and am eager to bring my coordination skills and positive energy to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can support the GEMS program.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Communication Officer position supporting the GEMS program at Atlas Copco Airpower, as advertised via Tempo-Team. With a strong foundation in digital communication, content creation, and cross-functional coordination, I am confident in my ability to facilitate the flow of information for this global transformation.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and coordinate website updates—skills directly transferable to creating and maintaining communication plans, drafting newsletters, and developing visual materials. I am proficient in PowerPoint, SharePoint, and Forms, and I have experience using tools like Canva and Sway for content creation. My project mirook.com involved designing a multi-page website, implementing structured data, and managing social media integration, demonstrating my ability to handle complex information and tailor messages for different audiences.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively learning Dutch (A2 level). I thrive in international environments and am eager to collaborate with roll-out managers, process experts, and local communication specialists across countries like China, Italy, Spain, and the UK. My proactive approach to planning and follow-up, combined with my positive energy, will allow me to make an immediate impact on the GEMS program.

I am drawn to Atlas Copco's culture of rapid development and individual contribution. This temporary role is an ideal opportunity for me to apply my communication skills in a large-scale project while growing professionally. I am available to start as soon as possible and am fully committed to supporting the team until the end of 2026.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can contribute to the success of the GEMS program.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proven experience in creating and coordinating communication materials, including newsletters, presentations, and visual content.
Strong coordination skills with a proactive approach to planning and follow-up, demonstrated through managing multiple projects simultaneously.
Proficient in PowerPoint, SharePoint, Forms, and other office applications; experienced with content management systems and analytics tools.
Fluent in English and Turkish, with basic Dutch (A2) and a commitment to further language development.
Ability to adapt messages for diverse, international audiences, supported by experience in cross-functional and remote team environments.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Communication · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and content creation, now seeking to apply my communication and coordination skills in a global corporate environment. At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write targeted content, and coordinate website updates—skills directly transferable to creating clear communication plans, newsletters, and visual materials. On my own project (mirook.com), I developed and executed a full communication strategy including social media integration and structured data implementation. Comfortable with office applications like PowerPoint, SharePoint, and Forms, and experienced in adapting messages for diverse audiences. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Communication & coordination: creating communication plans, newsletters, presentations, visual materials, coordinating with international teams
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Office applications: PowerPoint, SharePoint, Forms, Copilot, Sway
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
